summary: Iteration 77 - Testing NEW Availability Calendar feature on vehicle detail page. Backend API and Frontend calendar modal both working correctly. All features verified.

issues: data-testid attributes not accessible in Expo Web - text-based selectors work as fallback

critical_code_review_comments: AvailabilityCalendarModal.tsx is well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces
API integration uses correct endpoint with month/year parameters
Color coding for available (green) and booked (red) days is clear and intuitive
Reservation details display includes time (HH:mm) and status as requested
Navigation to booking page correctly passes date parameter in URL

test_credentials.note: No auth required for vehicle detail pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 77 tested the new Availability Calendar feature. All features working: modal opens, shows color-coded days, displays reservation details on booked days, shows 'Reserver cette date' button on available days, and navigates to booking page with date parameter. Backend API returns correct booked_dates and reservations arrays.

frontend_calendar_modal.voir_la_disponibilite_button: PASS - Opens calendar modal instead of navigating to booking
frontend_calendar_modal.modal_header: PASS - Shows 'Disponibilite' and vehicle name 'Toyota Yaris Hybrid'
frontend_calendar_modal.calendar_grid: PASS - Monthly view with day cells
frontend_calendar_modal.booked_day_click: PASS - Shows reservation details with times (08:11 - 08:11) and status (Confirmee)
frontend_calendar_modal.booking_navigation: PASS - Navigates to /booking/{id}?date=2026-04-15 with date parameter

playwright_tests_performed: Verify vehicle detail page loads with Toyota Yaris Hybrid
Verify calendar modal opens with correct header and stats
Verify April 2026 calendar shows booked days (4-10, 20-22) in red
Click on booked day 6 - verify reservation details appear
Click on available day 15 - verify 'Reserver cette date' button appears
Click 'Reserver cette date' - verify navigation to booking page with date parameter
